title: capsella subarctica
intro: Capsella subarctica, also known as the Arctic shepherd's purse or Arctic cress, is a plant species within the Brassicaceae family. It is a succulent annual herb native to the Arctic tundra and alpine regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. Capsella subarctica can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves to promote wound healing, reduce swelling, and soothe irritated skin.
